strategy_outcomes.name: BTC 4h Deep Value Reclaim v1
strategy_outcomes.edge_mechanism: mean reversion after a deeper downside displacement reclaims medium value and rotates back toward balance in a chop-dominant market
strategy_outcomes.hypothesis: BTC 4h is the cycle primary lane and current context is chop-dominant with transition contamination. The edge is not generic oversold buying. It is buying only after a meaningful downside displacement fails and price reaccepts medium value, which should create rotation back into balance when the breakdown cannot sustain.

long: Exit remaining 20% on loss of VWAP or 5 bars
short: Exit remaining 20% on reclaim of VWAP or 5 bars

strategy_outcomes.rationale: abort: fail with QS 0.17, PF 0.19, DD 1.7%, trades 6

strategy_outcomes.name: ETH 4h Squeeze Persistence Release v1
strategy_outcomes.edge_mechanism: compression releases directionally, but entry waits for persistence above fast structure rather than the first breakout bar
strategy_outcomes.hypothesis: ETH 4h is the cleanest squeeze lane in the allowed basket because current regime is 100% chop. The edge is not the first breakout print. It is participating only once release persists beyond the initial bar, which should reduce false breaks while keeping enough density in a compressed market.

long: Time-based de-risk: cut 20% more after 6 bars if no 1.0 ATR expansion
short: Time-based de-risk: cut 20% more after 6 bars if no 1.0 ATR expansion

strategy_outcomes.rationale: 0 trades on valid data (integrity_skip:zero_trades_both_samples; integrity_skip:zero_trades_both_samples; integrity_skip:zero_trades_both_samples) — Quandalf must explicitly choose iterate or abort.

strategy_outcomes.name: TAO 4h Failed Breakdown Hold Continuation v1
strategy_outcomes.edge_mechanism: a downside break fails, price reclaims support, then holds that reclaimed structure before continuation entry into resumed trend
strategy_outcomes.hypothesis: The cycle concept set explicitly includes failed breakdown reclaim that must hold before continuation entry. TAO 4h is the best-fit lane because it is the only allowed 4h asset currently showing real trend-up contamination. The edge is not simple dip-buying. It is joining the resumed move only after the failed breakdown proves that reclaimed support can hold.

long: Scale in: add 25% if trade reaches +0.55 * ATR_14 and close remains above EMA_20
Take profit: 0.70 * ATR_14 on 35% of initial size
Take profit: 1.35 * ATR_14 on 30% of total size
short: Scale in: add 25% if trade reaches +0.55 * ATR_14 and close remains below EMA_20
Take profit: 0.70 * ATR_14 on 35% of initial size
Take profit: 1.35 * ATR_14 on 30% of total size

recent_lessons.observation: Strategy QD-20260312-C69-ETH-BREAKOUT-HOLD-v1 on ETH/4h is slightly losing (PF 0.938). Edge exists but costs eat it.
recent_lessons.implication: Try tightening stops, widening TP, or adding a regime filter to trade only in favorable conditions.

guidance.instruction: Work strategy-by-strategy and queue-row-by-queue-row. For each spec, choose exactly one overall decision: pass, refine, or abort. Inside that strategy decision, include one queue_decision for every queue row in the packet. If a strategy produced 0 trades on valid data, treat that as a red flag that must resolve explicitly as either refine or abort. Do not omit any tested row and do not use promote, fix_only, skip, pending, or undecided.
